'''âl-z-j-m''' ('''kalazjemoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:yean|yean]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-z-j-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yean|yean]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âl-z-j-m
|-
! Lemma
| kalazjemoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thilazjemoko|thilazjemoko]] || [[word:jilazjemoko|jilazjemoko]] || [[word:shilazjemoko|shilazjemoko]] || [[word:kilazjemoko|kilazjemoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthulazjemoko|thuthulazjemoko]] || [[word:jujulazjemoko|jujulazjemoko]] || [[word:shushulazjemoko|shushulazjemoko]] || [[word:kukulazjemoko|kukulazjemoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thulazjemoko|thulazjemoko]] || [[word:julazjemoko|julazjemoko]] || [[word:shulazjemoko|shulazjemoko]] || [[word:kulazjemoko|kulazjemoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thulazjemoko|thulazjemoko]] || [[word:julazjemoko|julazjemoko]] || [[word:shulazjemoko|shulazjemoko]] || [[word:kulazjemoko|kulazjemoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tholazjemoko|tholazjemoko]] || [[word:jolazjemoko|jolazjemoko]] || [[word:sholazjemoko|sholazjemoko]] || [[word:kolazjemoko|kolazjemoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠlazjemoko|thĂŠlazjemoko]] || [[word:jĂŠlazjemoko|jĂŠlazjemoko]] || [[word:shĂŠlazjemoko|shĂŠlazjemoko]] || [[word:kĂŠlazjemoko|kĂŠlazjemoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathalazjemoko|thathalazjemoko]] || [[word:jajalazjemoko|jajalazjemoko]] || [[word:shashalazjemoko|shashalazjemoko]] || [[word:kakalazjemoko|kakalazjemoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thalazjemoko|thalazjemoko]] || [[word:jalazjemoko|jalazjemoko]] || [[word:shalazjemoko|shalazjemoko]] || [[word:kalazjemoko|kalazjemoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thalazjemoko|thalazjemoko]] || [[word:jalazjemoko|jalazjemoko]] || [[word:shalazjemoko|shalazjemoko]] || [[word:kalazjemoko|kalazjemoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
